creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
Does I misunderstood this one:
configure:
7584 if test x"$ac_cv_header_pugixml_hpp" = xyes -a x"$ac_cv_lib_pugixml_main" = xyes ; then
   7585   { $as_echo "$as_me:${as_lineno-$LINENO}: Using the system version of the pugixml library   7585 " >&5
   7586 $as_echo "$as_me: Using the system version of the pugixml library" >&6;}
   7587   PUGIXML_INTERNAL=no
   7588 else
   7589   { $as_echo "$as_me:${as_lineno-$LINENO}: Using the internal version of the pugixml libra   7589 ry" >&5
   7590 $as_echo "$as_me: Using the internal version of the pugixml library" >&6;}
   7591   PUGIXML_INTERNAL=yes

??

I think it will set PUGINXML_INTERNAL=yes ?
